name: Package
description: Class which represents the current Package

static_functions.name: Export
static_functions.description: Makes any variable available in the global scope

parameters.name: variable_name
parameters.description: Name of the variable to export

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be set in the global scope

static_functions.name: Require
static_functions.description_long:
Loads a .lua file. Note that this method caches the result, so further calls return the cached value.

We currently support 5 searchers, which are looked in the following order:
  1. Relative to current-file-path/
  2. Relative to current-package/Client/ or current-package/Server/ (depending on your side)
  3. Relative to current-package/Shared/
  4. Relative to current-package/
  5. Relative to Packages/

Note: Clients will only download and have access to Client/ and Shared/ folders.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Path to the script file to load

parameters.name: force_load
parameters.description: Whether to force loading this file even if it was already loaded

return.description: any return values from the included file

static_functions.name: LoadFile
static_functions.description: Compiles a .lua file and returns a function to run it
static_functions.description_long:
Compiles a .lua file and returns a function to run it. To be used for loading files in a sandboxed environment.

Supports the same searchers as Package.Require.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Path to the script file to compile

function_parameters.name: custom_env?
function_parameters.description: Custom environment to run the script with (defaults to the package's own _ENV)

return.description: the compiled function to run the script, allowing you to pass a environment env table for the script

examples.title: Loading a .lua file sandboxed
content: -- Only allows this file to access Console
-- Access all global variables set by the script in my_env

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback to run on the event occurring

static_functions.name: Unsubscribe
static_functions.description: Unsubscribes from all subscribed Events in this Class and in this Package, optionally passing the function to unsubscribe only that callback

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Optional callback to specifically unsubscribe to

static_functions.name: SetPersistentData
static_functions.description: Sets a Persistent Value which will be saved to disk
static_functions.description_long: Sets a Persistent Value which will be saved to disk. Note the actual flush to disk is deferred and may not occur immediately

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key to index data into. It can be separated by '.' to set a child element.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to set at the key

static_functions.name: GetDirectories
static_functions.description: Gets a list of all directories in this package
static_functions.description_long: Gets a list of all files in this package, optionally with filters

static_functions.name: GetFiles
static_functions.description: Gets a list of all files in this package
static_functions.description_long: Gets a list of all files in this package, optionally with filters

static_functions.name: GetPersistentData
static_functions.description: Gets the Persistent Value from the disk
static_functions.description_large:
Gets a Persistent Value from the disk
Pass no parameter to return the whole table, or a key to get a specific value

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to get the data

static_functions.name: FlushPersistentData
static_functions.description: Flushes the Persistent Data pending changes to disk immediately
static_functions.description_large: Flushes the Persistent Data pending changes to disk immediately. Note: this operation is already performed automatically under the hood, it is not necessary to keep always flushing and should only be used when really needed, as disk writing is a slow operation

static_functions.name: IsUnloading
static_functions.description: Returns whether this package is currently unloading

events.name: Load
events.description: Called when this package is loaded
events.description_long:
Called when this package is loaded

This event is triggered differently depending on the situation:
  • When the server starts or you run package reload all the event triggers only after ALL packages are loaded.
  • In all other cases (package load/reload or Package.Load/Reload) the event is triggered immediately after the package is loaded/reloaded.

events.name: Unload
events.description: Called when this package is unloaded
